votes.rationale: Motion-0037 successfully added a deterministic Claude bootstrap generator. The repo now emits a dated Claude bootstrap markdown handoff plus a manifest sidecar derived from Claude-facing artifacts, formal substrate artifacts, and current generated context.

The motion stayed properly scoped. It created a compact generated Claude handoff without drifting into provider orchestration, account automation, or canonical-truth replacement. The markdown output is stable across reruns and the manifest clearly records inputs.

The implementation is coherent and practically useful. The generated Claude bootstrap pack now connects repo-local Claude guidance, formal substrate artifacts, and current generated context into a reusable dated setup layer for immediate project or chat bootstrap.
